race.comment: HOT NOVA (10) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1000m at this track when sixth. Well placed and there is no reason she cannot find winning ways. DASHING DIVA (4) can bounce back to winning ways as she drops back to an easier race today after finishing seventh last time over 1400m at this track. WILLYABRUP (12) finished in tenth at his most recent appearance over 1600m at this track. Appeals as a top-four contender. DAIYAMONDO (1) continued a long win drought when beaten 12 lengths into 13th at this track over 1600m on July 10. No surprise if she found some form here.
